methods.method_name: Collection of Germinating Pollen and Pollen Tubes for RNA Extraction
methods.description: A method to collect a large amount of germinated Arabidopsis pollen for microarray experiments, improving upon previous methods by achieving a higher germination rate.

steps.description: Develop a thin liquid layer in vitro PG method for Arabidopsis pollen grains to germinate well in vitro.
steps.searchable_summary: create in vitro environment for pollen germination

steps.description: Collect pollen grains at 45 min after incubation in liquid medium as the HP sample.
steps.searchable_summary: collect pollen grains after 45 min incubation

steps.description: Extract RNA from the collected pollen grains to represent the transcriptome information for PG.

methods.description: Analysis of microarray data using Affymetrix software to ensure reproducibility and reliability, including normalization and detection of transcriptionally changed genes.

steps.description: Conduct two biological replicates and extract RNAs from two independent plant populations.
steps.searchable_summary: perform biological replicates and RNA extraction

steps.description: Analyze scanned arrays with Affymetrix GCOS 1.0 (MAS 5.0) software to generate detection calls.
Normalize all six data sets using Affymetrix GCOS software with TGT value set to 100.
steps.searchable_summary: normalize data sets with Affymetrix GCOS

steps.description: Calculate signal ratio between two stages to represent fold change of gene transcription.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate fold change of gene transcription

steps.description: Determine transcriptionally changed genes using exclusive approach and fold change criteria.

methods.description: Analysis of genes with altered transcription levels during PG and PTG using Gene Ontology and gene family tables to classify and identify functional categories.

steps.description: Conduct Gene Ontology (GO) analysis using FunCat Scheme version 2.0 web service.
steps.searchable_summary: perform GO analysis with FunCat Scheme

steps.description: Classify genes into 14 main GO categories based on transcription changes.
Use gene family tables to further analyze potential functions of genes with altered transcription.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze gene functions using family tables

steps.description: Integrate contents of gene family tables to identify important functional categories.
steps.searchable_summary: integrate gene family data for functional analysis
